body:
AdSome people give up dessert in January. IтАЩm definitely not one of those peopleЁЯНж 

ЁЯТМ Comment тАЬYES!тАЭ for more dessert recipes with a nutritious twist!

Yes, IтАЩm a nutritionist and yes, I still eat dessert. Ice cream everyday? OH GO ON THEN. Sometimes with a lil fibre boost, sometimes just because itтАЩs plain old dessert!!! My current hyper fixation: The Ninja CREAMi

MY CURRENT FAV RECIPES:

ЁЯНП Apple Pie Ice Cream
250g stewed apple (skin on - see video)
200g greek yoghurt (or plant-based alternative)
50ml milk of choice
1 tbsp honey / agave / syrup
1 tbsp ground oats
1 tsp cinnamon
pinch of salt
Method: Blend everything until smooth, pour into your Ninja Creami tub, freeze for 24 hours, then spin on the ice cream setting

ЁЯНМ Banana & Vanilla Froyo
2 large ripe bananas
100g greek yoghurt (or plant-based alternative)
100ml milk of choice (I used vanilla soy)
1 tsp vanilla extract
1 tbsp maple syrup
Pinch of salt
Method: Blend all ingredients until silky, freeze in your Creami tub for 24 hours, then spin on the frozen yoghurt setting

ЁЯНл Chocolate Date Soft Serve
250g greek yoghurt (or plant-based alternative)
50ml milk of choice
2 Medjool dates (pitted)
1.5 tbsp cocoa powder
2 tbsp maple syrup
Pinch of salt
Method: Blend everything until smooth, freeze in the Creami tub for 24 hours, then spin on soft serve setting

OPTIONAL fibre boosts:  chia seeds, oats, flaxseed, coconut flakes, cocoa nibs or berries

SAVE AND ENJOY!

@NinjaKitchenuk #CreamiDiet  #NINJACREAMi #healthyrecipes

body:
ad Not breadтАж make my potato wrap instead!

The ultimate gf and plant based BLT with @ninjakitchenuk - saving time and effort with their containers that you can prep, cook and store in. Making this potato тАШwrapтАЩ took just 8 minutes with the roast function, but you can pretty much cook anything with their airfry, recrisp and keep warm functions ЁЯзЪЁЯП╝тАНтЩАя╕П

Makes 1 тАШBLTтАЩ
For the bacon
1/2 block smoked tofu
1 tbsp tamari
1 tbsp maple syrup
1/2 tbsp balsamic vinegar
1 tsp smoked paprika
1 tbsp olive oil
Salt and pepper

For the wrap
1 small potato
15g vegan cheddar

To build
Handful shredded lettuce
1 tomato, sliced
1 tbsp vegan mayo

Using a mandolin on the thicker setting, thinly slice ┬╜ block of smoked tofu. Add into the smaller Crispi container along with the remaining ingredients. Add the lid, shake the container to mix and place into the fridge to marinade until ready to cook. Snap on the Crispi lid and air fry for 10тАУ12 minutes, flipping halfway, until crisp and caramelised.

Thinly slice the potato using the thinnest setting on the mandolin. Add a layer of greaseproof into the larger Crispi basket, tucking in the edges so it doesnтАЩt fly away! Arrange the slices in a slightly overlapping square pattern to form a flat wrap shape. Sprinkle over the vegan cheddar, season and drizzle with a little oil. Snap the lid on and roast for 8 minutes or until golden and crisp.

Carefully remove the potato wrap from the Crispi once it has cooled for 2 minutes. Spread with vegan mayo, then layer on the shredded lettuce, tomato slices, and tofu bacon. Fold or roll gently to serve.

And the Ninja CRISPi is only ┬г149 on ninjakitchen.co.uk!

#crispisavestheday

body:
We made a protein packed cereal milk sort serve with our new Ninja Creami SwirlЁЯНж.

Recipe:

Ingredients:

тАв 400ml of milk
- 70g 1 of frosted flakes
- тБа1 scoop of vanilla protein powder
- тБа1/4 teaspoon of Xanthan Gum powder.
- тБа1/4 teaspoon of vanilla essence
- тБаpinch of salt

Instructions:

Step 1: Combine milk & cereal together and leave to soak for 3-4 hours.

Step 2: Use a sieve to separate the cornflakes from the milk and add the milk to the Creami tub.

Step 3: Mix in in the remaining ingredients to the tub and freeze for 24hrs.

Step 4: After 24 hours, attach the tub to the Ninja Creami and select тАЬSoft ServeтАЭ then select тАЬLite Ice CreamтАЭ.

Step 5: Once completed attach the tub to the soft serve dispenser to create your own soft serve swirl and enjoy!

Bonus tip- Garnish your ice cream with more corn flakes for a little added crunch.

@ninjakitchenuk 

#CREAMidiet

body:
AD | Meal prep that actually works with @ninjakitchenuk

This 1.6kg chicken gave me 4 days of crispy, juicy meals - made in one machine, in a tiny kitchen.

The Ninja Crispi air fried it in about 60 minutes, and now all I do is hit тАЬRecrispтАЭ for 5тАУ10 minutes each night. DinnerтАЩs done. Fresh salad on the side. 10 minutes total.

The trick? A killer marinade and knowing when to cover the top with foil if it starts browning too fast.

HereтАЩs the marinade I used
тАв ┬╝ cup avocado oil
тАв Juice of ┬╜ lemon
тАв 1 tbsp Dijon mustard
тАв 1 tbsp each garlic & onion powder
тАв 1 tbsp smoked paprika
тАв 3 tbsp Italian seasoning
тАв 1 tsp each chili powder, allspice & black pepper
тАв 1 tbsp fresh rosemary + oregano
тАв 1 tsp salt

Roast to 73┬░C next to the bone and let it rest before carving.
One cook. Four meals. Would you try this?

#CRISPiSavesTheDay

body:
ad My first time trying the Ninja Swirl ЁЯШН

I think I have a new favourite toy @ninjakitchenuk ЁЯдг this thing can turn almost anything into ice cream! I fear I may have to take up that challengeтАж ЁЯСА Lemme know if you have any flavour suggestions ЁЯЩК

I made homemade cookies and cream ice cream, that was so easy and tasted incredible!
I also made frozen Greek yoghurt soft serve, that has 39g of protein per pint, which also tasted amazing! ЁЯЩМ

IтАЩll always believe you can enjoy ice cream every day, no rules, no guilt. What I love about The Swirl is how it makes staying aligned with your goals so easy and flexible, without taking the joy out of dessert ЁЯдМ

Recipes below:

Cookies & cream ice cream:
60g caster sugar
20g cream cheese
2 tsp vanilla
165ml double cream
250ml whole milk
3 cookies & cream biscuits, broken

Frozen yoghurt soft serve:
430g Greek yoghurt (5% fat)
3 tbsp honey
2 tsp vanilla
50ml whole milk
Toppings: frozen blueberries, melted in the microwave, granola & honey

Enjoy!
#fitwaffle #fitwafflekitchen #creamidiet #ninjacreami #icecream

body:
AD | As itтАЩs Burns Night this week, we used the Ninja Creami Swirl to put our own twist on a traditional Cranachan dessert ЁЯП┤ґаБзґаБвґаБ│ґаБгґаБ┤ґаБ┐ . Those doing Dry Jan donтАЩt need to miss out as our recipe is alcohol free!

Recipe:

Ingredients:

- 1 cup raspberries (plus some extra for garnish)
- тБа200ml milk
- тБа1 tablespoon of honey
- тБа1 tablespoon of yoghurt
- тБа1/2 teaspoon of vanilla extract
- тБа1/4 teaspoon Xanthan gum powder
- тБаPinch of salt
- тБа1/4 cup of toasted oats

Instructions:

Step 1: Blend the milk and 1 cup of raspberries together until smooth.

Step 2: Add the blended ingredients into the Ninja Creami tub along with the Xanthan gum, honey, salt and vanilla and mix.

Step 3: Freeze the tub for 24hrs.

Step 4: After 24 hours, attach the tub to the Ninja Creami and select тАЬSoft ServeтАЭ then select тАЬLite Ice CreamтАЭ.

Step 5: Once completed, attach the tub to the soft serve dispenser to create your own soft serve swirl.

Step 6: Add your toasted oats and some fresh raspberries on top of your swirl and enjoy.

Bonus tip: You can drizzle extra honey on top of your swirl if you like it nice and sweet ЁЯНп.

@ninjauk

#CREAMiDiet

body:
4 lunches for ┬г6 ~ Crispi Beef & Broccoli Noodle Bowls ЁЯеж AD
 
These high-protein noodle bowls are loaded with flavour and couldnтАЩt be easier, thanks to the Ninja Crispi. From storage, to prep, to cleaning- theyтАЩve thought of everything. I love that the base of the crispi containers are designed for reheating, which is then separated by the crisper plate, where you add all of your ingredients that you want a crispy, caramelised result. I love portioning out the individual containers for my meal prep so that all my lunches are ready for the week and I can just grab them from the fridge and cook for 5 minutes. Plus when IтАЩm done I can just throw it in the dishwasher!
 
Ingredients 
500g beef mince (┬г3.50)
1 head of broccoli, florets and stalks sliced (┬г0.47)
200g noodles (┬г1.45)
Fresh coriander, chopped to serve (┬г0.52)
 
Cupboard Essentials 
For the noodles: 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tbsp honey. For the beef, 1 tbsp cornflour, 1 tsp garlic granules, 1 tsp honey, 1 tbsp soy sauce. 
 
Method
1. Add your noodles and broccoli to salted water and cook for 5 minutes. Drain and coat in the ingredients for the noodles. Also combine the cupboard ingredients with the beef until fully incorporated. 
2. Divide the noodles/broccoli into the base of the Ninja crisp containers. Add the crisper plate, then add a layer of seasoned beef mince. Use the lid to seal then place in the fridge when cool enough. 
3. When itтАЩs time to eat, simply remove the lid and place the Ninja crisp onto the container. Airfry for 5-7 minutes, then serve with a sprinkle of coriander and enjoy! 
 
@ninjakitchenuk #mealprep #budgetmeals #ninjacrispi

My Ninja Luxe Caf├й has become my favourite way to have a little moment to myself, flat whites, espresso,

TodayтАЩs line-up:
Cosy Chorizo, Garlic & Parmesan Pasta

and a very dangerous coffee brownie, because apparently тАЬtestingтАЭ now includes dessert ЁЯСАЁЯНЭЁЯНл

#AD WeтАЩre turning a tipper into a tiny home - Day 7 
Although we have now built the frame to go on top of our tipper, we have some repairs that we need to do to make the tipper legal to drive. But because we are working outside and itтАЩs freezing cold, weтАЩre making some pukka coffees using the Ninja Luxe Caf├й to helps us stay warm! This 3-in-1 coffee machine is so easy to use and gives a range of caf├й-quality drinks whilst we are working! We love this coffee machine so much and love making coffees for the people who are helping us on this project! 
@ninjakitchenuk 
#tinyhome #coffee #vanlife #tinyhomebuild foryou

body:
Ad CRISPi ran the kitchen today. I just showed up.

Breakfast: Air Fried Frittata
3 whole eggsтАи2 egg whitesтАи1/4 cup low-fat cottage cheeseтАи1/4 cup diced bell peppersтАи1/4 cup chopped spinachтАиSalt and pepper to tasteтАиWhisk all ingredients together. Cook in Ninja Crispi on air fry for 15 to 20 minutes, mixing every 5 minutes until set and lightly golden. Let cool before slicing.

Lunch: Chicken and Veggie BowlтАи1 large skinless chicken breasts, dicedтАи1 tbsp olive oilтАи1 tsp paprikaтАи1/2 tsp garlic powderтАи1/2 cup broccoli floretsтАи1/2 cup chopped carrotsтАиSalt and pepper to tasteтАиToss chicken with oil and spices. Cook on air fry for 10 minutes. Add broccoli and carrots and cook another 10 minutes until chicken is cooked and vegetables are tender. Serve with brown rice or quinoa.

Dinner: High-Protein Turkey Cheeseburger
500g lean ground turkey (93%)
Half grated onion
1 teaspoons Dijon mustard
1 cloves garlic, minced
1 teaspoon onion powder
1 teaspoon Italian seasoning (optional)
1 teaspoon salt
┬╜ teaspoon black pepper
2 slices reduced-fat cheddar cheese
Mix all ingredients except cheese and form 4 patties. Cook in Ninja Crispi on air fry for 10 to 13 minutes, flipping halfway, until cooked through. In final minute, place a slice of cheese on each patty and close lid to melt. Let rest 2 minutes before serving.

The Ninja┬аCRISPi┬аis just ┬г149 at┬аninjakitchen.co.uk

@NinjaKitchenUK #CRISPiSavesTheDay

body:
AD | caramelised banana bread iced latte with a banana bread cold foam cause summer isnтАЩt over yet ЁЯШП

jess a cuppa has opened again and now featuring a brand-new gorgeous coffee machine to help me creative some amazing coffees ЁЯШН

@ninjakitchenuk Ninja Luxe Caf├й pro is a 3 in 1 coffee machine that grinds, scales and tamps PLUS itтАЩs got loads of customisable drink options meaning cafe-quality drinks at home ЁЯЩВтАНтЖХя╕П and my FAV feature, where you can create creamyy cold foam while brewing your espresso at the same time! 

recipe 

caramelised banana syrup:

1 tbsp butter
2 bananas, chopped
┬╜ cup dark brown sugar
┬╜ cup light brown sugar 
1 cup water
1 tsp maple syrup
┬╜ tsp cinnamon powder
┬╝ tsp nutmeg or can omit if donтАЩt have 
Pinch salt 
1 tbsp vanilla extract

method:

- melt butter in a pan then add in chopped bananas and fry until both sides start to brown
- add brown sugar in stages and mix into the bananas 
- once fully mixed in, add water and mix
- add cinnamon powder, nut meg, pinch of salt, maple syrup & bring to a boil then simmer for 10 mins
- here you can strain to only get the syrup or let cool before adding vanilla extract and blending until smooth (can add a bit more water if necessary)
store in fridge for up to 2 weeks 
 
cold foam:

2 tbsp double cream
1 tbsp milk
1 heaped tsp banana bread syrup 

toppings: cinnamon & pan-fried banana slices 

#NinjaLuxeCafe #ninjakitchenuk #bananabreadsyrup #homecafe #icedlatte #espresso

body:
4 lunches for ┬г6 ~ Crispi Beef & Broccoli Noodle Bowls ЁЯеж AD
 
These high-protein noodle bowls are loaded with flavour and couldnтАЩt be easier, thanks to the Ninja Crispi. From storage, to prep, to cleaning- theyтАЩve thought of everything. I love that the base of the crispi containers are designed for reheating, which is then separated by the crisper plate, where you add all of your ingredients that you want a crispy, caramelised result. I love portioning out the individual containers for my meal prep so that all my lunches are ready for the week and I can just grab them from the fridge and cook for 5 minutes. Plus when IтАЩm done I can just throw it in the dishwasher!
 
Ingredients 
500g beef mince (┬г3.50)
1 head of broccoli, florets and stalks sliced (┬г0.47)
200g noodles (┬г1.45)
Fresh coriander, chopped to serve (┬г0.52)
 
Cupboard Essentials 
For the noodles: 2 tbsp soy sauce, 1 tbsp rice vinegar, 1 tbsp honey. For the beef, 1 tbsp cornflour, 1 tsp garlic granules, 1 tsp honey, 1 tbsp soy sauce. 
 
Method
1. Add your noodles and broccoli to salted water and cook for 5 minutes. Drain and coat in the ingredients for the noodles. Also combine the cupboard ingredients with the beef until fully incorporated. 
2. Divide the noodles/broccoli into the base of the Ninja crisp containers. Add the crisper plate, then add a layer of seasoned beef mince. Use the lid to seal then place in the fridge when cool enough. 
3. When itтАЩs time to eat, simply remove the lid and place the Ninja crisp onto the container. Airfry for 5-7 minutes, then serve with a sprinkle of coriander and enjoy! 
 
@ninjakitchenuk #mealprep #budgetmeals #ninjacrispi

body:
PISTACHIO, MISO + BANANA SOFT SERVE ЁЯНж 

as you MIGHT have noticed, IтАЩm not normally one to make desserts or anything sweet. but when an opportunity arose to make homemade ice cream, but healthier, I couldnтАЩt resist ЁЯСА

ad @ninjakitchenuk asked me to make a summery soft serve in their new Swirl machine, so I decided to go for a pistachio, miso, tahini + banana flavoured - made healthier with coconut milk + maple syrup. and it was ABSOLUTELY delicious ЁЯдд 

this was my ice cream of choice - but you can get super creative with your flavours, toppings + ice cream type ЁЯНи

for my ice cream mix, I simply blended: 1 can (400ml) coconut milk, 1 banana, 100g toasted pistachios, 1 tbsp tahini, 1 tsp miso paste, 80g maple syrup + a pinch of salt. Then followed the Ninja Swirl instructions ЁЯдУ

but tell me, would you give my recipe a go? let me know in the comments below ЁЯСЗ 

#icecream #softserve #homemadeicecream #easyrecipes #summerrecipes #NinjaSwirl
